data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. FORT LANGLEY has been in the market at his last couple of runs but failed to threaten, the latest effort a modest sixth at this track (Turf) over 1609m. Likely improver who should be in the finish this time. 4. GOOD FOCUS is a model of consistency with top-three finishes at his last six starts, most recently finishing second over 1308m at Turf Paradise. Hard to knock and is a winning hope again. 2. MCCLUSKY ran below expectations last time at this track (Turf), finishing sixth and beaten 4.5 lengths starting at $4.10. Finds a suitable assignment and can make amends. 9. BATTLE CRUISER fought on for second last start over 1609m at this track (Turf), beaten 4 lengths to add to some fine recent form. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways.","runners":[1,4,2,9],"exclusive":false}
